name: PCC - Check Cashing
description_short: ACE Cash Express in Charlotte offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and prepaid banking products without requiring a bank account.
description_long: ACE Cash Express operates a physical location at 228 Eastway Dr in Charlotte, NC, serving consumers who need financial services outside traditional banking channels. The company is part of a broader network offering check cashing and money services across multiple states. ACE Cash Express provides check cashing services that accept most types of checks with only a valid government-issued ID required—no bank account necessary. They also offer money transfers through MoneyGram, money orders, bill payment services, ATM access, tax refund cashing, and business check cashing with competitive fees and extended service hours compared to traditional banks. The company distinguishes itself by offering integrated financial products including the Porte mobile banking app (with services provided by Pathward, National Association, Member FDIC), the Flare Account for online banking, and the ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card. These products bridge the gap between check-cashing convenience and basic banking functionality. ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate access to cash without maintaining a traditional bank account, as well as business owners requiring flexible check-cashing services outside standard banking hours. The main caveat is that while convenient, check-cashing services typically involve fees, and the company's prepaid banking products are dependent on third-party FDIC-insured banking partners rather than being direct banking services.
address: 4621 Central Ave Suite C, Charlotte, NC 28205

company_info.headquarters: 4621 Central Ave Suite C, Charlotte, NC 28205

pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only valid government-issued ID needed
Extended service hours (open until 6 PM weekdays, 5 PM Saturday) beyond typical bank hours
Cash on hand for large business check amounts with competitive fees
Multiple integrated services in one location: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, ATM, tax refunds
MoneyGram money transfers available to over 200 countries and territories
FDIC-insured deposit accounts through Pathward for Porte and Flare Account holders
In-person support for prepaid card funding and cash withdrawals
cons: Check cashing and money services involve fees that are not disclosed on the location page
Limited to a single physical location; customers must visit in-person for check cashing
Prepaid banking products depend on third-party FDIC insurance provider (Pathward) rather than direct bank operations
Banking services are limited compared to full-service banks despite partnerships with Pathward
Store hours limited to 10 AM opening, excluding early-morning banking needs
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals who need check cashing without maintaining a bank account
Business owners requiring flexible check-cashing services outside standard banking hours
Consumers seeking money transfer services to domestic or international recipients
Individuals who prefer mobile banking and prepaid debit card solutions
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express Charlotte is best for unbanked consumers and business owners who need reliable check-cashing and money services with extended hours beyond traditional banking. The main caveat is that check-cashing services involve fees and the business model relies on in-person transactions at a single location, limiting accessibility for customers unable to visit during business hours.
services: Money transfers via MoneyGram (domestic and international to 200+ countries/territories)
Bill payment services (in-store and online for rent, utilities, credit cards)
ATM cash withdrawals and balance inquiries
Porte mobile banking app with in-person support
ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card issuance
Cash loading to debit and prepaid cards
